goal: 帮我申请一个年假，12月28号到29号，理由和地点分别为探亲和上海

action_sequence.description: Tap element at index 29: 点击"请休假"按钮进入请假申请流程 (AppCompatImageView) at coordinates (129, 301)
action_sequence.specific_behavior: 点击"请休假"按钮进入请假申请流程

action_sequence.description: Tap element at index 14: 选择年休假类别 (AppCompatImageView) at coordinates (371, 191)

action_sequence.specific_behavior: 点击开始时间区域以修改日期

action_sequence.description: Tap element at index 83: 选择12月28日作为开始日期 (TextView) at coordinates (56, 588)
action_sequence.specific_behavior: 选择12月28日作为开始日期

action_sequence.description: Tap element at index 20: 点击结束时间区域以修改日期 (LinearLayout) at coordinates (205, 275)
action_sequence.specific_behavior: 点击结束时间区域以修改日期

action_sequence.description: Tap element at index 84: 选择12月29日作为结束日期 (TextView) at coordinates (106, 588)
action_sequence.specific_behavior: 选择12月29日作为结束日期

action_sequence.description: Tap element at index 33: 点击确认按钮进入下一步填写理由和地点 (MaterialButton) at coordinates (205, 850)
action_sequence.specific_behavior: 点击确认按钮进入下一步填写理由和地点

action_sequence.description: Tap element at index 31: 点击提交按钮完成请假申请 (MaterialButton) at coordinates (304, 850)
action_sequence.specific_behavior: 点击提交按钮完成请假申请
